ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND ( !ISNEW(), OR ( ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE( Approval_Status__c ), 'Approved'), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE( Approval_Status__c ), 'Rejected'), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE( Approval_Status__c ), 'Auto Approved'), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE( Approval_Status__c ), 'Bulk Approved') ), Not(IsChanged( Project__c )) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Can't Modify Approved/Auto Approved/Bulk Approved Record
